unique_values: MME process crash due to null pointer dereference in S1AP handler
Memory leak in NAS signaling module causing gradual resource exhaustion over 72 hours
Race condition in attach procedure leading to duplicate session creation
CPU spike triggered by malformed TAU request flooding from specific UE firmware
HSS connection pool exhaustion under high concurrent authentication load
Incorrect handling of handover failure causing stale S1 context accumulation
Timer leak in paging procedure under heavy paging load conditions
Deadlock in bearer management module when SGW responds with unexpected cause code
Incorrect IMSI validation leading to false authentication rejections
S6a interface timeout not properly handled causing subscriber authentication loop
